name: @generata/starter
description: Bare-minimum starter: one agent, one workflow. Designed to be replaced as you build your own pipeline.
postInstall:
1. pnpm generata workflow hello --message "world"
  2. Edit agents/greeter.ts and agents/hello.ts
  3. Add your own agents alongside or replace greeter entirely

See README.md for the smallest possible map of what you got.
